data_note: Indicative Indian education-loan (study-abroad) figures compiled from publicly published lender rate cards and eligibility pages, captured June 2026. Sources: HDFC Credila (https://www.credila.com/education-loan-interest-rates-charges), GyanDhan Credila guide (https://www.gyandhan.com/credila-education-loan), Avanse vs Credila comparison (https://www.lorien.finance/blog/best-education-loan-study-abroad-avanse-credila-comparison), SBI Global Ed-Vantage (https://sbi.bank.in/web/personal-banking/loans/education-loans/global-ed-vantage-scheme), BankBazaar SBI Global Ed-Vantage (https://www.bankbazaar.com/education-loan/sbi-global-ed-vantage-an-overseas-education-loan.html). FOIR and the country rate nudge are standard underwriting norms, not a single lender's published figure. Lenders set actual terms after assessment; these are for guidance only.
